data.title: CZ Declares He Won’t Return to Binance After Trump Pardon – What’s Going On?
data.description:
Former Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao confirmed at Davos he has no plans to return to the exchange despite receiving a presidential pardon in October, instead focusing on education projects and government crypto advisory work while predicting Bitcoin could break its four-year cycle in 2026.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/cz-declares-he-wont-return-to-binance-after-trump-pardon/

data.title: Senior economics professor says Bitcoin is ‘fool’s gold’
data.description:
Steve Hanke, a senior economics professor at Johns Hopkins University, has said the recent market performance reinforces his long-standing view that Bitcoin (BTC) is ‘fool’s gold’ rather than a genuine store of value.  The economist’s critique comes as gold prices surged to record highs above $5,000 per ounce, while Bitcoin has lagged, trading in the upper $80,000 range after falling sharply from its 2025 peak. In a January 25 post on X, Hanke shared a comparative chart showing gold up about 48% over the period, while Bitcoin is down roughly 21.6%
source: https://finbold.com/senior-economics-professor-says-bitcoin-is-fools-gold/

data.title: CBOE Volatility Index Rises Slightly
data.description: The Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE) Volatility Index has experienced a slight increase. According to ChainCatcher, the index rose by 1.09 points, reaching 17.18 points.

data.title: Mixed Performance for Crypto-Related Stocks in Pre-Market Trading
data.description:
Crypto-related stocks showed mixed performance in pre-market trading, according to data from msx.com. According to Odaily, Strategy (MSTR) saw an increase of 1.32%, while MARA Holdings (MARA) rose by 2.04%. In contrast, Sharplink Gaming (SBET) experienced a decline of 0.31%, BitMine (BMNR) fell by 0.35%, and Circle (CRCL) decreased by 0.03%.

Msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, including those representing U.S. stocks and ETFs such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: OKX will suspend all deposit and withdrawal services for Aptos network tokens to support Aptos network maintenance.
data.description: OKX will be performing wallet maintenance on the Aptos network. To ensure a smooth maintenance process, please note the following arrangements: Suspension Time: From 11:00 AM (UTC+8) on January 28, 2026, deposit and withdrawal services for all tokens on the Aptos network will be suspended. Service Resumption: After the network upgrade is complete, we will resume deposit and withdrawal services once the network is stable, without further announcement. No Action Required: If you hold Aptos network tokens or other related tokens within the network in your account, no action is required during the network upgrade.

data.title: The Bitget Launchpool project SPACE is now open for investment, with a total prize pool of 22.94 million SPACE tokens.
data.description: Bitget's current Launchpool project, Spacecoin (SPACE), is now open for investment. Locking up BTC, ETH, and SPACE will unlock 22,947,000 SPACE tokens. ETHSPACE lock-up pool: Total airdrop amount: 1,148,000 SPACE tokens; Individual lock-up limit: 30,000,000 SPACE tokens.

data.title: Multiple Polymarket addresses profited by betting on Rick Rieder, with one address showing a floating profit of over $180,000.
data.description: According to The Poly Nerd, odds in the Polymarket prediction market regarding "who Trump will nominate as Federal Reserve Chair" have shifted. Previously, Kevin Hassett's support exceeded 70%, while Rick Rieder's support briefly fell below 5%. Subsequently, Rick Rieder's odds rose to approximately 50% within a week. Several early entrants are currently experiencing substantial unrealized profits and share common characteristics such as fresh initial funding sources, limited trading history, and a focus solely on political predictions. Among them: macrotrading (0x960...41c) had an average entry price of $0.05 and currently has a floating profit of $184,400, with a profit/loss ratio of 783.13%; HD2DGames (0x654...202) had an average entry price of $0.18 and currently has a floating profit of $162,000; msk11 (0x280...6f2) had an average entry price of $0.01 and currently has a floating profit of $57,500, with a profit/loss ratio of 3882.78%; atg1 (0x334...0e1) had an average entry price of $0.09 and currently has a floating profit of $45,200; 0xe85d...259f had an average entry price of $0.03 and currently has a floating profit of $36,700, with a profit/loss ratio of 1739.89%.

data.title: Bitcoin Sees $4.5B in Realized Losses as Selling Pressure Spikes
data.description:
Bitcoin has just recorded $4. 5 billion in realized losses, marking the largest loss event in nearly three years, according to on-chain data from CryptoQuant. The Net Realized Profit and Loss (NRPL) metric shows a sharp red spike, signaling that a significant volume of coins was sold at prices below their acquisition cost. This kind of […] The post Bitcoin Sees $4
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-sees-4-5b-in-realized-losses-as-selling-pressure-spikes/

data.title: Market Volatility Seen as Peak of Bearish Pressure, Analyst Says
data.description: Yi Lihua suggests that the current market volatility signifies the peak of bearish sell-off pressure but does not pose a threat to the overall bullish market trend. According to NS3.AI, despite recent fluctuations in the price of ETH between $2,100 and $2,800, these variations are considered normal given the broader market conditions and historical price behavior. The analyst recommends maintaining accumulation strategies and emphasizes that downturns in the crypto industry are temporary and will eventually subside.

data.title: Minneapolis Shooting Sparks Concerns Over U.S. Government Shutdown, Affecting Bitcoin Prices
data.description: The recent shooting in Minneapolis has heightened concerns about a potential U.S. government shutdown, leading to a negative impact on Bitcoin's price. According to NS3.AI, the uncertainty in the market and increased risk aversion have prompted investors to seek refuge in safe haven assets such as gold and silver. As a result, Bitcoin has experienced a decline of over 5% in the past week. Despite the short-term selling pressure and ETF outflows, some analysts believe that the macroeconomic conditions remain broadly supportive for Bitcoin's medium-term outlook.

data.description:
Since 2026 started, Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading with much volatility, despite some attempts to climb back toward $100,000, with a downward bias.  The cryptocurrency’s latest turn was similarly bearish as BTC crashed 3% to $86,226 in the last 24 hours before partially retracing to land at $87,882 for a total one-day drop of 0.32%. BTC price 24-hour chart
source: https://finbold.com/when-bitcoin-will-crash-to-50k-according-to-chatgpt/

data.title: BlockSec and Bitget jointly released a year-end report analyzing the new paradigm of Web3 transactions and security in the AI ​​era.
data.description: BlockSec, in collaboration with Bitget, released a research report titled "AI × Trading × Security: Risk Evolution 3.0 in the Era of Intelligent Trading." The report systematically analyzes how AI is reshaping Web3 trading efficiency and decision-making logic, focusing on the evolution of AI capabilities and their integration with Web3. It further explores the evolutionary trends of Web3 attack and defense in the AI ​​era and new security paradigms. The report also outlines the application directions and real-world challenges of AI in the Web3 security system from the perspectives of risk control, anti-money laundering, and risk identification. In a specific case study, the report uses Bitget's GetAgent as an example, pointing out that it leans more towards general-purpose trading information and investment advisory tools. GetAgent is not a traditional conversational robot, but rather a "second brain" for traders in complex liquidity environments. Its core logic lies in building a complete closed loop connecting data, strategies, and trade execution through the deep integration of AI algorithms and real-time multi-dimensional data, assisting users in making more effective decisions in high-frequency, multi-variable market environments. The report concludes by noting that the deep integration of Web3 and AI has become a significant trend in the industry, while security, risk control, and compliance capabilities are crucial foundations for the continued advancement of this trend. The report emphasizes the need for collaboration among different institutions within the industry to advance the development of technology, governance, and security standards, jointly promoting the healthy and sustainable development of the intelligent trading era.

data.title: PYUSD is now available on the Stable network.
data.description: According to official sources, PayPal's USD stablecoin PYUSD has been launched on the Stable network.

data.title: Coinbase Commerce hackers exchanged $5.9 million worth of DAI for 2,038 ETH and transferred the funds via Tornado Cash.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, after a year of silence, the Coinbase Commerce hacker (0xFe7...06F8) exchanged $5.9 million worth of DAI for 2,038 ETH at a price of $2,894, and then transferred the ETH through Tornado Cash.

data.title: Yi Lihua: The bears have entered the most frenzied selling phase; the fluctuation of ETH by several hundred dollars is within the normal range.
data.description: Yi Lihua posted: "The market has been quite volatile these past few days. From our investment research, the bears have entered their most frenzied selling phase, but this won't affect the overall bull market trend. Especially given the continued strength of US stocks and the US's national crypto strategy, we will not be affected and will not change our investment strategy. In the last round, we achieved nearly 2.5 times returns on ETH, and we also experienced the pullback from 2800 to 2100 due to the Middle East black swan event. A few hundred dollars of fluctuation is within the normal range. As the bulls in this round, we've been the subject of much online ridicule lately, with fluctuations of hundreds of millions of dollars overnight, like a rollercoaster ride. But the bigger the storm, the more valuable the fish. Besides, there's no such thing as 100% guaranteed profits in investing. In short, our continued effort is to buy more ETH on dips using various strategies. Recently, safe-haven funds have been in the gold and silver markets, but there will definitely be times when profits are taken and funds flow back. The lowest point for the crypto industry will eventually pass."

data.title: BNB Drops Below 870 USDT with a 1.19% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 26, 2026, 09:36 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 870 USDT and is now trading at 869.98999 USDT, with a narrowed 1.19% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Oasys Faces Investment Warning from South Korean Exchanges
data.description: The Digital Asset eXchange Alliance (DAXA) in South Korea has issued an investment warning for Oasys (OAS) on its member exchanges. According to NS3.AI, this decision indicates heightened caution for investors dealing with OAS on these trading platforms. The alliance's action highlights concerns about the asset's risk profile.

data.title: El Salvador Increases Bitcoin Holdings by 31 BTC Over Past Month
data.description: El Salvador's government has increased its Bitcoin holdings by 8 BTC in the past week and 31 BTC over the past month. According to Odaily, the country's total Bitcoin holdings now stand at 7,543.37 BTC, valued at $661 million.

data.title: Ripple's XRP Sales Reach $109 Billion Since 2012
data.description: Since its inception in 2012, Ripple and its executives have sold over 58.5 billion XRP tokens, amounting to approximately $109 billion. According to NS3.AI, Ripple was initially allocated 100 billion XRP, and their current holdings are about 41.485 billion XRP. Ripple has indicated that the purpose of these sales is to address concerns about centralization. During this period, the price of XRP has increased by approximately 31,000%.
